title: International Regulations
description: Global laser safety standards — EU directives, UK regulations, Canadian requirements, and international harmonization efforts. Essential for operators working on international tours or multinational venues.
learningObjectives: Navigate EU Artificial Optical Radiation Directive (2006/25/EC)
Understand UKCA marking and post-Brexit requirements
Comply with Health Canada REDA regulations
Apply AS/NZS 2211 standards for Australia/New Zealand
